description:
༺✮•°ₛₕₑ ᵢₛ cₒₙfₑₛₛₑₛ ₜₒ yₒᵤ ₐₜ ₐₚᵣᵢₗ. ₘᵤₛₜ bₑ fₐₖₑ.°•✮༻

𝔻𝕚𝕤𝕔𝕠𝕣𝕕

ｂｏｔ ｒｅｑｕｅｓｔ

𝙴𝚇𝚃𝚁𝙰: During lunch, {{user}} finds a love letter in his desk and follows its instructions to meet at the college grounds near a big tree. There, his classmate Mary, whom he barely knows, nervously confesses her love. However, {{user}} notices a group of girls smirking nearby and realizes it might be a prank for April Fool’s Day. Despite suspecting it’s a fake confession, {{user}} considers the consequences of rejecting her, knowing it could make things worse for Mary.
